rag_rules: Fix type mismatches in assume/guarantee expressions by ensuring boolean types where required
Resolve syntax errors in AGREE contracts by correcting unmatched parentheses and invalid terminators
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE expressions to avoid unresolved references
Ensure type consistency in AGREE constant and equation declarations (int, real, bool)
Place implementation-level assignments in implementation scopes and avoid placing guarantees there
Validate that all identifiers in AGREE contracts are properly declared or visible in the current scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Assume and guarantee expressions must evaluate to boolean type
Use proper syntax for binary operators like '->' with matching operand types
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use only assumptions and assignments
Do not reference undeclared or invisible identifiers in AGREE contracts
